items.title: OpenAI’s Jalapeño AI chip; Nekko’s next growth engine
items.summary: OpenAI has stepped beyond the world of models by announcing its first-ever custom-built chip named Jalapeño. Bengaluru-based Nekko is positioning itself as an AI and machine lea...

items.title: Trump Admin releases Anthropic Mythos to be used by more than 100 US companies, agencies
